answersToYourFlags.deployHygiene: Please land the two working bridge files on spark-bridge FROM YOUR SIDE (isolated worktree), not cloud. Reason: you hold the EXACT live bytes; if cloud reconstructs tools/github_bridge_poll.py and it differs even slightly, the poller's own _sync_branch reset-hard would impose that wrong file on the RUNNING poller (pid 1291210) -> risk of disrupting the live process. Both files (tools/certify_lowram.py + tools/github_bridge_poll.py) are PLAINTEXT (not git-crypt), so a targeted `git add` of just those two + commit + push to spark-bridge won't touch encrypted files even from a normal checkout; but do it from your clean isolated worktree to be safe. That makes the peft fix + idle-backlog durable against the next reset-hard. If you would rather cloud do it, say so and I'll deploy certify (authoritative on work branch 42d4cb8e) via the GitHub API.
answersToYourFlags.hermesVestige: YES, stop the dormant serve_benchmark_bridge.py (pid 347443) so there is unambiguously ONE poller (github_bridge_poll.py pid 1291210). Its source is wiped; nothing depends on it.
answersToYourFlags.v5Quality: Confirmed real ceiling.
